app.name: NoteGen
app.one_liner: A cross-platform Markdown AI note-taking application that uses intelligent agents and RAG to transform fragmented inputs into structured notes.

screens.name: Main Note Editor
screens.purpose: Primary workspace for editing Markdown notes with AI assistance, file navigation, and agent interaction.

screens.name: Settings
screens.purpose: Configure sync backends (WebDAV/S3), AI models, and application preferences.

rust_commands.name: list_items
rust_commands.purpose: Retrieve list of notes or files from local storage or remote sync backend.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist a note or configuration item to local storage and queue for sync.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add WebDAV sync configuration screen
week 1: Implement core Markdown editor with local save/load
week 1: Integrate basic AI agent for note summarization
acceptance_tests: Notes starting with '1. 2. 3.' render consistently without unexpected jumps [E-IS-004].
On macOS, Command+number shortcuts do not interfere with system-level shortcuts [E-IS-001].
Starting a new AI conversation clears the previous context to avoid leakage [E-IS-005].
Window title correctly displays current note name on desktop platforms [E-IS-006].
